hooks.command: if [ "$CLAUDE_CODE_REMOTE" = "true" ]; then git fetch origin main && git checkout -B main origin/main; fi || true
echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"GATE: Run /gcse-triage first — no exceptions. Declare the lane (A–G) before touching any file."}}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"COMMIT GATE — confirm each item before proceeding:
1. /gcse-triage was run and the workflow lane (A–G) was declared
2. /ponytail-review run on the diff
3. Story written or updated (if props/behaviour changed, or new reusable component)
4. Docs updated (if reusable pattern, token, route, or workflow rule changed)
5. Build passes: ./node_modules/.bin/vite build
6. Tests pass per docs/system/workflows/README.md testing table:
   - Module metadata changed → vitest run tests/architecture
   - Logic files changed → vitest run tests/unit
   - Stories in play → vitest (full, Playwright)
7. /verify completed in the running app (Standard/Big Build only)
If any item is outstanding, stop and complete it first."}}'
